entity_classes.label: Carcinogen
entity_classes.description: An exogenous agent with carcinogenic classification (IARC or equivalent).

entity_classes.label: Enzyme
entity_classes.description: An enzyme mediating biotransformation, detoxification, or repair.

entity_classes.label: Metabolite
entity_classes.description: A chemical species produced during metabolic biotransformation.

entity_classes.label: DNA Adduct
entity_classes.description: A covalent modification of DNA resulting from carcinogen activation.

entity_classes.label: Pathway
entity_classes.description: A biological process or signaling pathway relevant to carcinogenesis.

module_classes.label: Exposure Source
module_classes.description: Module class for exogenous agent sources and exposure families.

module_classes.label: Biotransformation Process
module_classes.description: Module class for metabolic activation, detoxification, conjugation.

module_classes.label: Mechanism
module_classes.description: Module class for pathway perturbation and carcinogenic process logic.

module_classes.label: Tissue Context
module_classes.description: Module class for tissue-specific context and expression weighting.

module_classes.label: Modifier
module_classes.description: Module class for host-side susceptibility modifiers.

module_classes.label: Outcome
module_classes.description: Module class for endpoint states and mutational signatures.

module_classes.label: Evidence & Provenance
module_classes.description: Module class for evidence bundles and provenance records.

maturity_classes.label: Descriptive
maturity_classes.description: Browsable graph and evidence content without formal causal interpretation.

maturity_classes.label: Causal
maturity_classes.description: Edges and motifs have explicit directional or mediator semantics.

maturity_classes.label: Executable
maturity_classes.description: Module has typed inputs/outputs plus a scoring rule or update function.

maturity_classes.label: Twin-ready
maturity_classes.description: Module outputs map directly into Cancer Ecology Digital Twin state variables.
